page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server developed for transmembrane protein structure prediction. It contains two main prediction functions, i.e., transmembrane helix (TMH) prediction and TMH-TMH residue contact prediction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server developed for transmembrane protein structure prediction. It contains two main prediction functions, i.e., transmembrane helix (TMH) prediction and TMH-TMH residue contact prediction.
